source_commit: 32abc0f task6-ddr3: correct v110 source7/source8 summary signatures
interpretation: DFII init-only (edge-comp) still fails with the same stall signature: init_done true but init_error true and pll_locked false. No native path is active, and no WR/WDF events are observed. This pushes root cause toward global DFII/init sequencing and/or PLL/read-target handoff state at this build lineage rather than native readscan coupling.
next_action: Run a minimal direct-init telemetry build (disable edge compare as well, leave only CAL+status sampling) to see if the same pll_locked false/init_error true survives; if it persists, compare this with a known good pre-regression bitstream via startup/DFII state traces.
